description: Writing Terraform configurations and modules to provision and manage cloud infrastructure
example_requests: create a Terraform module to provision an EKS cluster
write Terraform code for a VPC with public and private subnets
build a reusable Terraform module for an RDS instance
set up Terraform configuration for a multi-region deployment
create Terraform IAM roles and policies for a Lambda function

questions.question: Which cloud provider are you targeting?
What types of resources need to be provisioned?
options: Multiple resource types — I will specify

questions.question: Where will Terraform state be stored?
Should this be a reusable module or a one-off configuration?
options: Reusable module with input variables and outputs
One-off root configuration for a specific environment
Published module for the Terraform Registry

questions.question: Are you working with existing infrastructure?
Which Terraform version should be targeted?
